advancement.tcrcore.abyss_eye.desc: §a§oWhen the abyss devoured the land, He fused himself into the seabed, his flesh became a city of bubbles.
advancement.tcrcore.abyss_kill.desc: Defeat The Leviathan and obtain The Tidal Claw.
advancement.tcrcore.cursed_eye.desc: §a§oWhen the traitor pierced her back, frozen tears instantly sealed three thousand ghost ships.
advancement.tcrcore.cursed_kill.desc: Defeat Maledictus and obtain The Soul Render.
advancement.tcrcore.desert_eye.desc: §a§oThe guardians are not monsters; they are living tombstones willingly transformed by the people.
advancement.tcrcore.desert_kill.desc: Defeat Ancient Remnant and obtain The Wrath of the Desert.
advancement.tcrcore.ef_legacy.desc: Everything are obtainable through crafting, featuring different weapon skills and animation templates. Check JEI for recipes and skill info.
advancement.tcrcore.flame_eye.desc: §a§oWhere magma surged, He pulled out his heart, forging an eternal beacon.
advancement.tcrcore.flame_kill.desc: Defeat Ignis and obtain The Incinerator.
advancement.tcrcore.kill_pillager.desc: The task is complete. Return to the The Sanctuary Keeper.
advancement.tcrcore.mark_map.desc: The Sanctuary Keeper has marked the locations of the scattered Divine Eye on your map. Now, go reclaim them!
advancement.tcrcore.storm_eye.desc: §a§oWhen war ripped the sky, she used the storm as a stairway, building a suspended paradise for her people.
advancement.tcrcore.storm_kill.desc: Defeat Scylla and obtain The Ceraunus.
advancement.tcrcore.tcrcore.desc: Where the dream begins. Head to the The Sanctuary to find the The Sanctuary Keeper.
advancement.tcrcore.tcrcore_weapon.desc: All obtainable and adapted weapons or materials. Check [JEI] for acquisition methods and details.
block.block_factorys_bosses.dragon_skull: Obtained by defeating the §c[Underworld Knight]§r or §4[Infernal Dragon]§r
block.minecraft.dragon_egg.tcr_info: Obtained by defeating the §d[Ender Dragon]§r in the §dEnd§r
entity.minecraft.villager.tcrcore.answer: Mambo, mambo, oh my gilly, mambo~
Hakimi nanbei ludou~ Axi ga axi~
Ding dong ji~ Ding dong ji~
entity.minecraft.villager.tcrcore.option: [It seems the local residents are heavily corrupted!]
[Why can't I understand the villagers' language...]
info.tcr.boss_killed_ready_return: §6Boss has been defeated! Block interaction unlocked!
info.tcr.can_not_do_this_too_early: §6You are not destined to do this.
info.tcr.can_not_enter_before_finish: §6You are not destined to enter this cloudland.
info.tcr.can_not_enter_dim: It seems you have not yet gained the divine approval to enter... §6Continue collecting embers§r to receive more oracles!
info.tcr.cs_warning: §c§l WARNING！Compute Shader is inactive now! You could enable it in Epic Fight config to get a better experience!
info.tcr.death_info: §6When enemies are too powerful, try combining different skills!
info.tcr.dim_block_no_interact: §cBoss has not been defeated! Cannot interact with the cloudland blocks yet!
info.tcr.enter_dimension_tip: Right-click the altar core to enter the Cloudland
info.tcr.get_mimic_invite: [%s]: Otherworldly one, I knew I was right about you! Take this §6[%s§6]§f!
info.tcr.hit_barrier: This area is not available yet. Come back later!
info.tcr.illegal_item_tip2: §6Currently, you are not destined to use this item.
info.tcr.kill_arterius: [%s]: Otherworlder, you are indeed formidable! It seems the prophecy is true! Then, I shall bestow these pieces of [%s] upon you!
info.tcr.map_pos_marked_press_to_open: Labeled location, press [%s] to view the map.
info.tcr.press_to_open_portal_screen2: Click the §6[Scroll]§r in the inventory to return to previously activated stones!
info.tcr.press_to_skill_tree: Sufficient EXP available. Press §6[K]§f to allocate skill points!
info.tcr.reset_when_no_player: If no players remain in the Cloudland, leaving for too long will reset the Cloudland!
info.tcr.resonance_stone_usage: Can resonate with the location of the Angel's seal
info.tcr.second_after_boss_die_left: Returning to the Overworld in %d seconds
info.tcr.shift_to_pic: Attack when pressing Shift to pick-up
info.tcr.skill_point_lack: This skill requires %d skill points to unlock
info.tcr.time_to_altar: The scattered embers have been found. It's time to return and light-up the altars...
info.tcr.time_to_ask_godness_statue: §d*This item can be used at the statue of the Goddess.
info.tcr.time_to_end: All altars are lit. It's time to find the The Sanctuary Keeper to perform the ritual...
info.tcr.to_be_continue2: [P1nero]: §6Thank you for playing! More bosses are in the making, stay tuned for more!
info.tcr.tudigong_gift_get: §6[TuDi]§f: I have grown old and incapable, so Ill pass this treasure to you！
info.tcr.unlock_new_dim_girl: §6New options unlocked at the Ferry girl!§r
info.tcr.unlock_new_ftb_page: A new quest page has been unlocked. Please open the §6[Quest Book]§r to check
info.tcr.unlock_new_skill_page: A new skill book interface has been unlocked. Press §6[K]§r to check
info.tcr.use_true_eye_tip: Please use [%s] to right-click the altar core
info.tcr.weapon_innate_charge_tutorial: §6[Perfect Dodge]§c or §6[Perfect Parry]§c can charge certain weapons!
info.tcr.weapon_no_interact: Cannot interact! Please press [%s] vanilla mode or other item.
item.block_factorys_bosses.dragon_bone.t: Obtained by defeating the §c[Underworld Knight]§r or §4[Infernal Dragon]§r
item.cataclysm.chitin_claw.tcr_info: Obtained by defeating the §3[Giant Claw Guard]§r in the §3cloudland of Scylla§r
item.cataclysm.coral_chunk.tcr_info: Obtained by defeating the §a[Coral Colossus]§r in the §dcloudland of The Leviathan§r
It allows for special enchantments to be applied to pets.
item.efn.deepdark_heart.tcr_info: Obtained by defeating the §2[Warden]§r or §2[Captain Cornelia]§r
item.epicskills.ability_stone.tcr_info: Right-click to use and gain skill points
item.fromtheshadows.bottle_of_blood.tcr_: Brewed using §c[Crystallized Blood Marrow]§r, a drop from §d[Nehemoth]§r
item.sophisticatedbackpacks.advanced_mag: §cWarning! This item may cause important items to be sucked into the backpack and become invalid!
item.sophisticatedbackpacks.advanced_pic: §cWarning! This item may cause important items to be sucked into the backpack and become invalid!
item.sophisticatedbackpacks.magnet_upgra: §cWarning! This item may cause important items to be sucked into the backpack and become invalid!
item.sophisticatedbackpacks.pickup_upgra: §cWarning! This item may cause important items to be sucked into the backpack and become invalid!
item.tcrcore.ancient_oracle_fragment.usa: It bears an ancient oracle hinting at the locations of scattered embers. Show it to the The Sanctuary Keeper in the The Sanctuary; it might aid your adventure!
§cIn multiplayer mode, do not occupy other players'! Everyone must submit their own!
item.tcrcore.artifact_ticket.usage: Obtained from certain quests in the quest book. Can be used to refine artifact with the §3[Ferry girl]§r at the §d[Saint Harbor]§r
item.tcrcore.core_flint.usage: Use on an Obsidian Frame to open a Nether Portal.
item.tcrcore.dragon_flute.usage: Right-click to capture a dragon; right-click again to release it.
item.tcrcore.dual_bokken.usage: I may have skill issue but I'm not lacking on dedication so do you lacking in dedication?
item.tcrcore.magic_bottle.usage: Restores a certain percentage of mana when used. Once depleted, must be used in the main city to replenish MP.
item.tcrcore.mysterious_weapons.usage: It seems to record all manner of weapons from around the world. You should show it to someone who knows about such things.
item.tcrcore.necromancy_scroll.usage: It seems to hold the secrets of magic within. Show it to someone who understands it.
item.tcrcore.proof_of_adventure.usage: Forged from the names of all foes vanquished by your blade. Your journey has reached its end, and your courage is now legend.
item.tcrcore.rare_artifact_ticket.usage: Obtained from certain quests in the quest book. Can be used to refine rare artifact with the §3[Ferry girl]§r at the §d[Saint Harbor]§r
item.tcrcore.void_core.usage: Dropped by the [Ender Guardian] when defeated
item.waystones.warp_stone.tcr_info: Click the §6[Scroll]§r button in the inventory to teleport to activated waystones!
itemGroup.tcr.items: The Casket of Reveries — Core Items
screen.tcrcore.ans.first_enter_cloudland: Where is this? It looks like another world.
I should be able to leave here using a [%s] or the [teleport scroll] in my inventory. Once I'm out, I'll ask %s what's going on.
screen.tcrcore.ans.start_screen_0: %s! %s! (You keep repeating this name over and over.)
screen.tcrcore.ans.start_screen_1: What is this place? Such a grand sanctuary! Let’s go inside and take a look—maybe %s is waiting for me in there.
skill.tcrcore.perfect_dodge.tooltip: Play a cool animation when perfect dodge!
skill_tree.sword_soaring.unlock_tip: Unlocked by interacting with villagers in §6[Sky Island]§r using emeralds
unlock_tip.tcrcore.battleborn.water_avoi: Learned by trading with §6[Ribbit]§f using §d[Block of Amethyst]§f
